title: GateDecision
description: Output contract for the gate skill — final quality gate decision including traceability, coverage, and risk summary.

decision.description: Overall gate outcome: PASS means ready to ship, CONCERNS means proceed with caution, FAIL means blocked

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the gate decision was made

traceabilityMatrix.description: Per-criterion traceability showing which tests cover each acceptance criterion

tests.description: IDs or titles of tests that cover this criterion

covered.description: Whether this criterion has at least one covering test

waiverReason.description: Reason this criterion is intentionally not covered, if applicable

coverageRate.description: Fraction of acceptance criteria covered by at least one test (0.0–1.0)

reviewScore.description: Overall score from the review skill passed through to the gate report

openRisks.description: Risks that remain unresolved at gate time

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations for the team before or after shipping

summary.description: Narrative summary of the gate decision for display in CI output or PR comments
